text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I'm gonna race today! I'm gonna run super
fast!
choice_data_list:
I know this is a prestigious race, but try to stay
focused.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
choice_data_list:
It means it's very important. This is a graded
race, after all.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: A great race? Yeah, I bet it's gonna be amazing!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay! Time to move it or lose it!
